meaning: n.[心]自我中心主义,孤独症
examples: We are actually trying to develop a compound to treat a very severe form of autism.
The way Baron puts it, provocatively, to be a man is to suffer from a very mild form of autism.
Autism does not allow learning or thinking in the same ways as in children who are developing normally.
About 700 scientists are in Boston today attending the International Meeting for Autism Research.
More employers are becoming aware of the needs of people on the autism spectrum.
